title: Rename export column label
description: Update the CSV export so the sprint column uses the approved label in downstream PMO reports.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: CSV header shows Sprint Name instead of Sprint
Existing export order remains unchanged

title: Add helper text to estimate form
description: Show a short helper line under the estimate input to remind users about Fibonacci sizing.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Helper text appears below the estimate field
No server-side changes are required

title: Display story owner badge
description: Show the assigned owner badge on the planning board card using the existing directory data.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Each story card shows the owner display name badge
If no owner exists the badge is hidden
Board load time does not regress

title: Expose release tag in list view
description: Add the release tag field to the story table and keep existing sort behavior intact.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Release tag is visible in the story table
Users can still sort by title and status

title: Audit estimate changes
description: Write an audit record whenever a story point estimate is changed from the planning board.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Audit event captures old estimate, new estimate, user, and timestamp
Audit records are viewable from the admin report
Failed audit writes do not block the UI save path

title: Restrict velocity dashboard by role
description: Ensure only delivery managers and product leads can access the velocity dashboard endpoint and UI route.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Unauthorized users receive a forbidden response from the API
Hidden navigation entry is removed for unauthorized users
Access events are logged for review

title: Export estimate variance dashboard
description: Provide an estimate variance dashboard with filters by release and allow CSV export for PMO review.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Dashboard displays variance by release and squad
CSV export matches the filtered dataset
Filters include release and team

title: Retry failed webhook deliveries
description: Add retry handling and operator visibility for failed outbound estimate webhooks to an external partner system.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Failed webhook deliveries are retried with exponential backoff
Operators can view retry status and terminal failures
Dead-lettered events can be replayed manually

title: Enable OAuth for planning admin API
description: Protect planning admin endpoints with OAuth client credentials and role-based permission mapping.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Admin API requires a valid OAuth token
Role mapping controls access to protected routes
Token validation failures are logged securely

title: Bulk assign stories to release train
description: Allow planners to bulk assign selected stories to a release train with validation, audit logging, and undo support.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Users can select multiple stories and assign them to a release train
Validation prevents incompatible release assignments
Bulk updates are captured in the audit trail
Users can undo the bulk assignment within the current session

title: Introduce estimate approval workflow
description: Create a multi-step estimate approval workflow with reviewer assignment, email notifications, reminders, and final status synchronization to Jira.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Estimates move through draft, submitted, approved, and rejected states
Reviewers receive notifications on submission and reminder cadence
Final approval status is synchronized back to Jira
Workflow actions are fully audited

title: Migrate estimate history schema
description: Extend the estimate history schema, backfill prior records, and keep reporting and export APIs compatible during rollout.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: New schema fields are added without data loss
Historical estimate records are backfilled
Existing reports continue to work during the migration
Rollback instructions are documented and tested

title: Create standalone estimation microservice
description: Build a new estimation microservice that accepts story lists, computes explainable Fibonacci estimates, persists audit logs, and exposes secure APIs for planning orchestrators.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Service exposes authenticated estimate endpoints
Every estimation request is audit logged
Responses include rationale and similar story references
Health and sample payload endpoints are available for local testing
Operational metrics are emitted for monitoring

title: Synchronize estimates across Jira and Azure DevOps
description: Design a secure integration path that propagates approved estimates to Jira and Azure DevOps, handles retries, stores reconciliation status, and alerts operators on sync drift.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Approved estimates are sent to both Jira and Azure DevOps
Transient sync failures retry automatically
Reconciliation status is stored for each story
Operators are alerted when sync drift persists
Secrets are managed without exposing credentials in logs
